name: Deferred - Old Attachment - 2
description: Second returns for old attachments from earlier chapters of a life.

results.description: [social -1] The attachment from {origin} ended openly and badly, leaving others to invent the parts you both refused to explain.
results.name: old-attachment-2

results.description: [money -40] Someone from {origin} asked more of your purse than of your heart, and sentiment proved expensive.
results.name: old-attachment-2

results.description: [contact] The old attachment from {origin} settled into a difficult but lasting bond instead of a clean ending.
results.name: old-attachment-2

results.description: [bio RollTable.wc0827FvVWKn4eJO] The relationship from {origin} broke again under the weight of the years between, and people noticed enough to talk.
results.name: old-attachment-2

results.description: [social 1] Someone from {origin} spoke well of you even after affection failed, which was a rarer gift than love itself.
results.name: old-attachment-2

results.description: [contact] The old attachment from {origin} did not become romance again, but it did become a person you could still trust at need.
results.name: old-attachment-2

results.description: [money -20] Old feeling from {origin} led you into one costly kindness that you could not quite regret.
results.name: old-attachment-2

results.description: [bio RollTable.kC0YeELeXOdwDeaJ] What had once bound you in {origin} ended quietly and with more grace than either of you deserved.
results.name: old-attachment-2

results.description: [contact] The old attachment from {origin} became a hidden loyalty rather than an open story.
results.name: old-attachment-2

results.description: [social -1] A former tenderness from {origin} soured into restraint, and restraint itself was enough to make others curious.
results.name: old-attachment-2

results.description: [money 20] Someone from {origin} repaid an old devotion in a practical way, which was not romantic but was undeniably useful.
results.name: old-attachment-2

results.description: [bio RollTable.mWI6zmHkHhQA84Yp] The attachment from {origin} faded at last, though some part of you kept testing the emptier place it left behind.
results.name: old-attachment-2

results.description: [social 1] The old attachment from {origin} ended honorably enough that your name suffered no harm from it.
results.name: old-attachment-2

results.description: [contact] Someone dear from {origin} remained in your life, though not in the place either of you once imagined.
results.name: old-attachment-2

results.description: [bio RollTable.wc0827FvVWKn4eJO] What returned from {origin} as affection left again as rumor, regret, and unfinished courtesy.
results.name: old-attachment-2

results.description: [contact] The old attachment from {origin} came to rest in a mature affection that no longer needed to pretend it had been simple.
results.name: old-attachment-2
